meaning: 1. banking circles; 2. the world of finance
sentence: 她在金融界工作了二十年。
pinyin: Tā zài jīnróngjiè gōngzuò le èrshí nián.
english: She has worked in the world of finance for twenty years.

meaning: 1. attached externally (e.g. fuel tank); 2. plug-in; 3. add-on; 4. spe
pinyin: Yòng wàiguà zuòbì huì bèi fēng hào.
english: Using cheat software will get your account banned.

meaning: 1. the following year; 2. the next year
sentence: 他们在翌年春天举行了婚礼。
pinyin: Tāmen zài yìnián chūntiān jǔxíng le hūnlǐ.
english: They held their wedding in the spring of the following year.

sentence: 该国的武装部队参与了救灾行动。
pinyin: Gāi guó de wǔzhuāng bùduì cānyù le jiùzāi xíngdòng.
english: The country's armed forces participated in disaster relief operations.

pinyin: Tā yòng fǔtóu pī kāi le mùchái.
english: He split the firewood with an ax.
